name: three-box3d-monorepo
description: Monorepo for three-box3d — 3D physics for three.js, powered by box3d (Erin Catto).

scripts.build: npm run build -w box3d-web && npm run build -w three-box3d
scripts.test: npm run test -w box3d-web && npm run test -w three-box3d
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w box3d-web && npm run typecheck -w three-box3d
